$comment: EXAMPLE ONLY. Never put a real production agent_key, hub URL, or token here. The manual test campaign uses a SEPARATELY delivered installer .ps1; this file is reference for what the operator should expect to be asked, not a config the test scripts read.

manual_test_profile.name: windows-agent-v2-manual-2026-06
manual_test_profile.intended_runner: Real Turkish Windows test machine, via AnyDesk

agent_placeholder.$comment: These are placeholders -- the real values arrive separately from the platform owner over a different channel.

do_not_send_back: any file containing X-Agent-Key, AGENT_KEY=, Bearer, JWT, or UUID-shaped tokens not already masked by the test package
